hero.title: Personal Data Protection Center (PDPA)
hero.subtitle: Office of Transport and Traffic Policy and Planning (OTP)

benefits.heading: Benefits to the Public and Government from
pointOneList: Confidence that personal data is securely stored, appropriately handled, and used only within stated purposes.
Reduces damages and distress caused by personal data breaches.
The right to be clearly informed of purposes, grant or withdraw consent, and request access, copies, disclosure, deletion, destruction, or suspension of personal data usage.
The ability to file complaints and request compensation if data is used beyond its stated purpose.
pointTwoList: Elevates the country to international standards regarding personal data protection laws.
Establishes effective regulatory measures and operational tools.
Promotes good governance with transparent and verifiable data protection operations.
Builds a strong society by allowing public and private sector data operations to be audited for accuracy.
Enhances the country's national image regarding data protection efficiency.

dpo.subtitle: Working Group for Personal Data Protection Officers of the Office of Transport and Traffic Policy and Planning (OTP)
dpo.chairmanTitle: Deputy Director-General of OTP (DCIO of OTP)

members.landTraffic: Director of Land Traffic Management Division
members.transportSystem: Director of Transport and Traffic System Development Division
members.ticketing: Director of Common Ticketing System Management Office
members.regionalTransport: Director of Regional Transport Promotion Bureau
members.adminSystem: Head of Administrative System Development Group

secretaries.itDirector: Director of Transport and Traffic Information Technology Center
secretaries.networkHead: Head of Computer and Network System Development Group
secretaries.networkRole: Working Group Member and Assistant Secretary
secretaries.infoPolicyHead: Head of Information Policy and Administration Group
secretaries.infoSystemHead: Head of Information System Development Group

dpo.duty1: Provide advice to the Data Controller or Data Processor, including their employees or contractors, regarding compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act.
dpo.duty2: Inspect the operations of the Data Controller or Data Processor, including their employees or contractors, regarding the collection, use, or disclosure of personal data to ensure compliance with the law.
dpo.duty3: Coordinate and cooperate with the Office of the Personal Data Protection Commission in cases of issues related to the collection, use, or disclosure of personal data.
dpo.duty4: Maintain strict confidentiality of any personal data known or acquired through the performance of duties, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act.
